result.summary: Found 1 major issue: text truncation in the navigation tab that reduces usability and clarity.

issues.description: The 'Hot Games' navigation tab is truncated and displays as 'Hot Gar' instead of the full tab name
issues.suggestion: Adjust the tab width, font size, or container padding to accommodate the full text, or use a responsive layout that properly wraps or resizes navigation items on smaller viewports
